title: BLD-501: Bump helix-cli package version from 1.3.3 to 1.3.4
description: Metadata-only version bump across 2 files (3 edit locations) to unblock the npm auto-deploy pipeline.

steps.title: Version field in package.json
steps.description: The package version field was bumped from '1.3.3' to '1.3.4'. This is the authoritative version source of truth. The auto-tag.yml workflow reads this field to decide whether to create a new git tag, and publish.yml validates the tag matches this version before publishing to npm.

steps.title: Root-level version in package-lock.json
steps.description: The root-level 'version' field in package-lock.json was updated from '1.3.3' to '1.3.4' to stay in sync with package.json. This is the first of two version locations in the lockfile.

steps.title: packages[""] version in package-lock.json
steps.description: The version inside packages[""] (the root workspace entry) was updated from '1.3.3' to '1.3.4'. This is the second version location in the lockfile and must match both the root-level lockfile version and package.json.
